function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), checked system and entity lane rulebooks, and used canonical cast record for named entity birthday.
function.outcome_justification: Using current date from context (2026-03-23), birthday search across cast showed the nearest upcoming birthday date is 03-26; canonical file 10_entities/cast/lukas.md confirms Lukas Brenner has birthday 1988-03-26, with no other cast file matched at that date.
